SEARCH
Package it.unipi.tonightscall.controller

Class EventController

java.lang.Object
it.unipi.tonightscall.controller.EventController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/event") public class EventController extends Object
REST Controller handling operations specific to Event.

    Constructor
    Description

    Calculates number of event per month over a given year, considering events available in a specific city

    • EventController

  • Method Details

    • getAllEvents

      @GetMapping("/events") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> getAllEvents(@RequestParam(defaultValue="0") @Min(0L) @jakarta.validation.constraints.Min(0L) int page)
      Find every event
      Parameters:
      page - The number of pages to return (the result is paginated)
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity containing the page or error

    • getEventById

      @GetMapping("/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> getEventById(@PathVariable String id)
      Find an event with a certain id
      Parameters:
      id - The id of the event
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity containing the EventDTOs or error

    • getEventsByTopic

      @GetMapping("/search/topics") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> getEventsByTopic(@RequestParam List<String> topics, @RequestParam(defaultValue="0") @Min(0L) @jakarta.validation.constraints.Min(0L) int page)
      Find events based on their topics
      Parameters:
      topics - The topics of the event
      page - The number of pages to return (the result is paginated)
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity containing the page or error

    • getEventsByDate

      @GetMapping("/search/date") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> getEventsByDate(@RequestParam LocalDate startingDate, @RequestParam(defaultValue="0") @Min(0L) @jakarta.validation.constraints.Min(0L) int page)
      Find events based on their starting date
      Parameters:
      startingDate - The starting date of the event
      page - The number of pages to return (the result is paginated)
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity containing the page or error

    • getEventsByCity

      @GetMapping("/city/{cityName}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> getEventsByCity(@PathVariable String cityName, @RequestParam(defaultValue="0") @Min(0L) @jakarta.validation.constraints.Min(0L) int page)
      Find events in a specific city
      Parameters:
      cityName - The name of the specific city in which to look for available events
      page - The number of pages to return
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity containing the page or error

    • getEventsByLocation

      @GetMapping("/search/location") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> getEventsByLocation(@RequestParam double longitude, @RequestParam double latitude, @RequestParam(defaultValue="10") double distance, @RequestParam(defaultValue="0") @Min(0L) @jakarta.validation.constraints.Min(0L) int page)
      Find events based on their location
      Parameters:
      longitude - The longitude of the center of the circle
      latitude - The latitudeof the center of the circle
      distance - The maximum admissible distance from "location"
      page - The number of pages to return (the result is paginated)
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity containing the page or error

    • getEventsByTopicAndDate

      @GetMapping("/search/topic-date") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> getEventsByTopicAndDate(@RequestParam List<String> categories, @RequestParam LocalDate date, @RequestParam(defaultValue="0") @Min(0L) @jakarta.validation.constraints.Min(0L) int page)
      Find events based on their topics and starting date
      Parameters:
      categories - The topics of the events
      date - The starting date of the events
      page - The number of pages to return (the result is paginated)
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity containing the page or error

    • updateEvent

      @PutMapping("/update-event/{event_id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> updateEvent(@PathVariable String event_id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication, @RequestBody EventDTO eventDTO)
      Updates the data of an event
      Parameters:
      event_id - The ID of the updated event
      authentication - The security context containing the current user's details (injected by Spring Security).
      eventDTO - The updated details of the event
      Returns:
      The updated eventDTO and the list of emails of every user which stated their presence at the event if successful, or an error message otherwise.

    • calculateStatistics

      @GetMapping("statistics/{event_id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> calculateStatistics(@PathVariable String event_id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Calculates the statistics of an event.
      Parameters:
      event_id - The ID of the event.
      authentication - The security context containing the current user's details (injected by Spring Security).
      Returns:
      The statisticsDTO containing the results of the calculation.

    • publishStatistics

      @PutMapping("/publishStatistics/{event_id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> publishStatistics(@PathVariable String event_id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Publishes the statistics of an event.
      Parameters:
      event_id - The ID of the event
      authentication - The security context containing the current user's details (injected by Spring Security).
      Returns:
      The eventDTO containing the statistics.

    • eventDemographics

      @GetMapping("demographics/{year}/{city_name}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> eventDemographics(@PathVariable int year, @PathVariable String city_name, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Calculates number of event per month over a given year, considering events available in a specific city
      Parameters:
      year - The year in which the events are held
      city_name - The city in which to look for events
      authentication - The security context containing the current user's details (injected by Spring Security).
      Returns:
      The list of months and count of events for each
